name: Abingdon (Tilsley Park)
metaTitle: Abingdon Athletics Track (Tilsley Park) | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for Tilsley Park in Abingdon.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text:
The facility follows a weekly schedule, though weekend hours may change if a private event or competition is taking place.

Monday – Thursday: 9:00 am – 10:00 pm
Friday: 9:00 am – 9:00 pm
Saturday: 8:30 am – 5:00 pm
Sunday: 9:00 am – 4:00 pm

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text:
Casual users can purchase track passes at the main reception.

Adult Track Pass (18+): £6.00 per session
Junior Track Pass (Under 18): £5.00 per session
Equipment Hire: Starting blocks are available for £1.50 (plus a £10 refundable deposit).

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text:
Surface: 8-lane, floodlit artificial synthetic track.
Field Facilities: Includes equipment for steeplechase, pole vault, high jump, long jump, and a dedicated throws area for javelin, shot put, discus, and hammer.
Spectator Seating: A 500-seat covered grandstand overlooks the finish line.
Certification: UK Athletics 'A' Grade track.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text:
On-Site Parking: There is a dedicated car park at the sports complex for visitors and athletes.
Accessibility: The site includes designated disability parking bays.
Navigation: Follow the brown tourism signs for "Tilsley Park" when approaching via Dunmore Road.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: Tilsley Park, Dunmore Road, Abingdon, Oxfordshire, OX14 1PU

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Tilsley Park website for more information and session bookings.
